title: BetterGUI
description: An animated menu, a simple menu-designing tool, or just a better GUI plugin
body:
# Feature

* Stable
* Modular design
* From Simple to Complex
* [Menu](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/menu) to make your dream one
* [Button](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/button) to add
* [Item Modifier](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/modifier) to edit your display item
* [Action](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/action) to execute
* [Requirement](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/requirement) to check before doing actions
* [Arguments in menus](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/argument)
* [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) support
* More features with [Addon](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon)
  * [BungeeCord support](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/bungee-link)
  * [Vault support](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/vault-bridge)
  * [PlayerPoints support](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/player-points-bridge)
  * [Custom conditions](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/eval-extra)
  * [PaperMC support](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/paper-spec)
  * [Custom item check](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/item-gotcha)
  * [Animated inventory title](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/dynamic-title)
  * [Forms from GeyserMC](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/better-forms.html)
  * [Dialogs](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/better-dialogs.html)
  * [Advanced GUI](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon/masked-gui.html)
  * [...and more](https://bettergui-mc.github.io/Docs/addon)

# Metrics
